section_blurb: Free downloadable content for MEP professionals — families, templates, asset libraries, and reference data. All curated by JPA Designs and the Adelphos community.

categories.title: Free Revit Families
categories.blurb: Production-grade MEP families with parameters that drive schedules, calcs, and tags out of the box.

categories.title: Project Templates
categories.blurb: Pre-configured Revit templates for housing, commercial, healthcare, and education sectors.

categories.title: Asset Data Libraries
categories.blurb: Manufacturer asset databases (radiators, AHUs, lights, fans) with COBie-compliant parameters.

categories.title: Setup Guides
categories.blurb: Step-by-step guides for setting up the Adelphos platform, integrating with ACC, and deploying agents.
